mission_title: Poetry Studio V1.1 — Guided Poem Creator

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py")
b=p.read_bytes()
actual=hashlib.sha256(b).hexdigest()
expected="229d45ac0b7b10182bd4b6a45faf7e09deb8bd56e2da8ed002b8e502d762e086"
assert actual==expected, f"installed hash mismatch: {actual}"
s=b.decode("utf-8")
compile(s,str(p),"exec")
required=(
"FOXAI_POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_STYLE_START",
"FOXAI_POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_HTML_START",
"FOXAI_POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_JS_START",
"FOXAI_POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_BACKEND_START",
"FOXAI_POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_STORAGE_START",
)
missing=[x for x in required if x not in s]
assert not missing, "missing markers: "+", ".join(missing)
print("POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_PYTHON_AND_HASH_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact payload hash, Python syntax, and Guided V1.1 build markers

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, os, re, shutil, subprocess, sys, tempfile
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py")
source=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
tree=ast.parse(source)
html_value=None
for node in tree.body:
    if isinstance(node,(ast.Assign,ast.AnnAssign)):
        targets=node.targets if isinstance(node,ast.Assign) else [node.target]
        if any(isinstance(t,ast.Name) and t.id=="HTML" for t in targets):
            html_value=ast.literal_eval(node.value)
            break
assert isinstance(html_value,str), "HTML constant not found"
blocks=re.findall(r"<script(?:\s[^>]*)?>(.*?)</script>",html_value,flags=re.I|re.S)
assert blocks, "No embedded JavaScript blocks found"
node=shutil.which("node") or shutil.which("node.exe")
if not node:
    candidate=Path(os.environ.get("ProgramFiles",r"C:\Program Files"))/"nodejs"/"node.exe"
    if candidate.is_file():
        node=str(candidate)
assert node, "Node.js was not found for embedded JavaScript syntax verification"
temp_path=None
try:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile("w",suffix=".js",encoding="utf-8",delete=False) as handle:
        handle.write("\n;\n".join(blocks))
        temp_path=handle.name
    result=subprocess.run([str(node),"--check",temp_path],capture_output=True,text=True,shell=False)
    if result.stdout:
        print(result.stdout)
    if result.stderr:
        print(result.stderr,file=sys.stderr)
    assert result.returncode==0, f"Node syntax check failed with return code {result.returncode}"
finally:
    if temp_path:
        Path(temp_path).unlink(missing_ok=True)
print("POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_EMBEDDED_JS_OK")
validations.name: Verify embedded Poetry Studio JavaScript syntax with Node

argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py")
s=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
required=(
"def kayock_writer_poetry_create",
"def kayock_writer_poetry_polish",
"def kayock_writer_poetry_revise_selection",
"def bibliotheca_status",
"KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_GUIDED_V2_BROWSER_START",
"KAYOCKS_STUDY_INTEGRATION_V1_HELPERS_START",
"ERIC_POET_NARRATOR_PROFILE_V1_START",
"FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_drafts']",
"FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_recordings']",
"FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_legacy']",
)
missing=[x for x in required if x not in s]
assert not missing, "protected integration anchors missing: "+", ".join(missing)
assert s.count("FOXAI_POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1")>=10
print("POEM_CREATOR_GUIDED_V1_1_PROTECTED_ANCHORS_OK")
validations.name: Verify Poem Polisher, stanza workshop, voice, archive, Study, and Writer anchors remain present
